Guest.title: Guest
Guest.description: Represents a wedding guest RSVP, contact info, event attendance, and seating assignment

email.description: Email address for boarding pass delivery

inviteCategoryId.description: The ID of the referring invite category

inviteCategoryName.description: The name of the referring invite category (e.g., Groom's family)

emailSent.description: Whether the boarding pass has been successfully simulated emailed

checkedInWhite.description: Pass boarded for the White Wedding ceremony

checkinTimeWhite.description: Timestamp of boarding for the White Wedding

checkedInTraditional.description: Pass boarded for the Traditional Wedding ceremony

checkinTimeTraditional.description: Timestamp of boarding for the Traditional Wedding

InviteCategory.title: Invite Category
InviteCategory.description: Represents a segment of invitees (e.g., Groom's parents, Bride's friends) with an entry password

name.description: Name of the group (e.g. Groom's Family)

password.description: Unique secret password to authenticate guests in this group

asoEbiContactName.description: Name of contact person for purchasing Aso Ebi

asoEbiContactPhone.description: Phone number/WhatsApp of contact person for purchasing Aso Ebi

createdBy.description: User UID who created this category

EventDetails.title: Event Details
EventDetails.description: Represents one of the wedding events (e.g., White Wedding or Traditional Wedding)

schedule.description: List of schedule items with time and activity

WellWish.title: Well Wish
WellWish.description: A message from a guest to the couple

Question.title: Question
Question.description: A question submitted by a guest

Gatekeeper.title: Gatekeeper
Gatekeeper.description: A check-in staff email address authorized to perform scans at the wedding gates

SeatingTable.title: Seating Table
SeatingTable.description: Represents a physical table created for seating arrangements at a specific event

name.description: Name or number of the table

eventId.description: ID of the ceremony event this table is associated with

capacity.description: Maximum number of seats available at this table

BroadcastNotification.title: Broadcast Notification
BroadcastNotification.description: System-wide and email notifications sent to passengers/guests for event updates and reminders

AsoEbiMaterial.title: Aso Ebi Material
AsoEbiMaterial.description: Represents a fabric or ensemble option offered to guests for purchase

price.description: Cost of the package (empty string for custom category pricing)

GiftItem.title: Gift Item
GiftItem.description: Represents an item in the wedding gift registry

GalleryImage.title: Gallery Image
GalleryImage.description: Represents a photo in the wedding gallery

url.description: The URL of the uploaded photo

caption.description: Optional text description for the photo

gifts.description: Collection of wedding registry gift items

asoEbiMaterials.description: Collection of Aso Ebi materials available for purchase

guests.description: Collection of RSVPs and guest details

inviteCategories.description: Groups of invited guests with passwords

events.description: Information about White and Traditional wedding events

wellWishes.description: Public well wishes for the couple

qAndA.description: Questions and answers for wedding updates

gatekeepers.description: Emails of check-in staff allowed to scan gate passes

seatingTables.description: Tables created for seating arrangements, associated with specific events

broadcastNotifications.description: Broadcast alerts and event reminders sent to invitees
